# Franchise Architect: Football

Franchise Architect: Football is a proprietary browser franchise simulator by VaultSpark Studios LLC.

Canonical URL: https://playfranchisearchitect.com/
Contact: football@playfranchisearchitect.com
Rights: Proprietary - All Rights Reserved, VaultSpark Studios LLC.

Useful paths:
- / - browser game
- /contact.html - project contact
- /privacy.html - privacy notice
- /terms.html - terms and rights notice
- /agents.json - machine-readable agent metadata
